content:
Essentially, you will be telling a story with a moral at the end. As you delve into this narrative, reflecting on your emotions during the event is important. To captivate your readers, incorporate character dialogues that bring the story to life and allow them to immerse themselves in your experience. Furthermore, ensure that you provide ample descriptions to paint a vivid picture in the reader's mind. Remember that you will be required to share a draft of your narrative essay in a discussion with your peers during Week 3. This may impact the topic you choose for this assignment. 
This week's first assignment will be to submit a prewrite for your Narrative Essay. The first step is understanding the makings of a meaningful and expressive narrative essay. Study.com
Links to an external site.
 gives a good overview of writing a narrative essay.

Instructions
A narrative essay is a short story. It's called an essay, but many narrative essays are just personal life short stories or storytelling at their core. Character dialogue and descriptive language to describe the setting are key aspects of a compelling narrative essay. You may find the following format helpful:
